scope: Complete the direct OpenRouter forced-tool path with a native bounded metadata-only proof receipt, failing closed at persistence, retry, upstream-evidence, and MCP-public-error boundaries while keeping the selected GLM proof-only.

test_results.command: git diff <immutable-start>..HEAD | SWORN_DIRECT=1 OPENROUTER_API_KEY=synthetic SWORN_OPENROUTER_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:1 bin/sworn verify --verifier-model openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.2 --spec <S22 spec> --diff - --proof <S22 proof>

SWORN_DIRECT=1 bin/sworn llm-check --proof-receipt --type spec-ambiguity --slice S22-openrouter-tool-structured-output --release 2026-07-15-baton-v0.16-conformance --model openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.2 --base <immutable-start> --json

reachability.evidence: cmd/sworn/llmcheck_test.go:TestLLMCheckOpenRouterToolStructuredBinaryReachability builds and drives sworn llm-check through the direct OpenRouter forced-tool wire; TestLLMCheckProofReceiptBinaryReachability drives the exact native v0.16 proof-receipt integration point and asserts metadata-only output.

delivered.item: AC-01 through AC-05 direct-only capability, exact forced-tool transport, reachability, malformed/canonical fail-closed behavior, and endpoint isolation
delivered.evidence: All named test_refs in spec.json pass under go test ./...

delivered.item: AC-06 atomic reservation/finalization and post-rename double-fault distrust
AC-07 and AC-08 reject JSON null arguments and non-function tool-call types after one request
AC-09 and AC-10 narrow typed retry policy and terminal failure behavior
AC-11 metadata-only receipt and stable sanitized MCP diagnostic
delivered.evidence: Proof/CLI leak canaries and TestLintTools_LLMCheckProviderErrorSanitizedReachability plus LeakCanary

delivered.item: AC-12 deterministic prerequisites and exact current S21 evidence binding
delivered.evidence: TestLLMCheckProofReceiptPreflightRequiresFreshS21VerificationEvidence; Captain review 798e114c; full test, vet, build, reachability, and zero-cost deterministic proof-bundle PASS

delivered.item: Captain pins 5 and 6 preserve classifier scope and proof-only GLM selection
delivered.evidence: No classifier broadening and no model default, catalogue, proxy, or routing-policy change in the S22 diff

not_delivered.item: AC-12 valid PASS receipt from the authorised native attempt-2 direct spec-ambiguity proof
not_delivered.why: Attempt 2 finalized as sanitized class opaque, result UNPARSEABLE, exit 2. AC-09 and AC-10 make every attempt-2 non-final outcome terminal, so no retry, fallback, or third dispatch is authorised.
The current sworn binary has no coverage verb; artifact-specific test refs and full Go gates are retained instead.
